commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=ef96a85304a05a0226a3f5fd99814c3bf58de776)
commands.review_summary:
The PR widens `sessions_spawn.taskName` validation and user-facing prompt/docs text to allow lowercase hyphenated aliases while adding focused unit coverage.

PR surface: Source 0, Tests +22, Docs 0. Total +22 across 6 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main rejects a hyphenated `taskName` through `normalizeSubagentTaskName`, and the PR adds unit coverage for the requested acceptance path.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor or human follow-up is needed for real behavior proof; the mechanical snapshot update alone cannot clear the external PR proof gate.

target.title: fix: allow hyphenated subagent task names
target.body:
Summary
- Cherry-pick the internal validator/error-message fixes that allow hyphenated `sessions_spawn.taskName` values.
- Update the tool schema, system prompt, and subagents docs so the user/model-facing contract matches the accepted grammar.
- Add regression coverage for hyphen acceptance, underscore preservation, and invalid uppercase/space/leading-hyphen inputs.

Provenance
- Internal source commits: `3b15bd33e6` and `b40bf3fbf4` (`fix(agents): allow hyphens in sessions_spawn taskName`, `fix(agents): sync taskName error message with relaxed regex`, author chenhaoqiang).
- Follow-ups on this PR branch: `0fe371c396` adds schema/test coverage; `ef96a85304` updates docs and system prompt contract after autoreview caught the stale underscores-only wording.

Verification
- `pnpm docs:list`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/tools/sessions-spawn-tool.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/tools/sessions-spawn-tool.test.ts src/agents/system-prompt.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base upstream/main`

Behavior addressed: `sessions_spawn.taskName` accepts common hyphenated task slugs while preserving rejection for invalid names.
Real environment tested: local upstream/main-based worktree under `.claude/worktrees/fix-subagent-taskname-hyphen`.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `pnpm docs:list`; `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/tools/sessions-spawn-tool.test.ts`; `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/tools/sessions-spawn-tool.test.ts src/agents/system-prompt.test.ts`; `git diff --check`; `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base upstream/main`.
Evidence after fix: sessions spawn tests cover hyphenated names, underscore aliases, and invalid uppercase/space/leading-hyphen inputs; system prompt test covers hyphen wording; docs and prompt now state `[a-z][a-z0-9_-]{0,63}`/hyphens; final autoreview reported no accepted/actionable findings.
Observed result after fix: Vitest passed with 2 files/98 tests before the docs-prompt follow-up, then 3 files/179 tests after it; diff whitespace check was clean; autoreview clean after accepting and fixing one stale-contract finding.
What was not tested: no live subagent session was launched outside the unit test harness.
target.author: lanzhi-lee

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
